name: Remix Oslo
description:
Welcome to an unforgettable b2b2b baton with Ornella, Charlotte Bendiks and Catu Atim at Remix Oslo 2026. Be there KAFÉ HÆRVERK Friday 19th of June 23:00-03:00.

CATU DIOSIS
As a DJ, rapper, dancer and producer from Uganda – Catu Diosis is an embodiment of the interdisciplinary spirit of the Nyege Nyege collective.

CHARLOTTE BENDIKS
The original Northern-Norwegian genre-bender, Charlotte Bendiks, will stand aplomb at Remix Oslo. 

ORNELLA
Ornella has gone from behind the bar to behind the decks, she is experienced, intuitive and fully at home in any club.— at KAFÉ HÆRVERK


Remix Oslo 2026 is a collaboration and co-curation between Digital Diaspora, Nyege Nyege Festival and Kilele Summit.
The festival is organized with support from Arts Council Norway / Kulturrådet.
